description: 预算执行审计领域NL2SQL测试集 - 100条

test_cases.question: 2024年全省一般公共预算总额是多少？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(annual_budget) AS total_budget FROM budget_indicator WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 AND budget_type = '一般公共预算'

test_cases.question: 列出杭州市所有部门的预算指标
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT dept_name, expense_category, annual_budget, adjusted_budget FROM budget_indicator WHERE region_name = '杭州市' AND fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 杭州市2024年的财政收入总额是多少？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(actual_amount) AS total_revenue FROM fiscal_revenue WHERE region_name = '杭州市' AND fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 列出所有专项资金名称及金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT fund_name, total_amount, fund_type, region_name FROM special_fund WHERE fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 2024年三公经费总预算是多少？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(budget_amount) AS total_budget FROM three_public_expense WHERE fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 查询教育类的预算指标
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, dept_name, annual_budget, adjusted_budget FROM budget_indicator WHERE expense_category = '教育' AND fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 年初预算最高的部门是哪个？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT dept_name, region_name, annual_budget FROM budget_indicator WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 ORDER BY annual_budget DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: 共有多少笔预算执行记录？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM budget_execution WHERE fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 查询所有因公出国经费记录
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, dept_name, budget_amount, actual_amount, person_count, detail_description FROM three_public_expense WHERE expense_type = '因公出国'

test_cases.question: 全省土地出让金实际收入是多少？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(actual_amount) AS total FROM fiscal_revenue WHERE revenue_category = '土地出让金'

test_cases.question: 各城市2024年的预算总额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, SUM(annual_budget) AS total_budget FROM budget_indicator WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY total_budget DESC

test_cases.question: 各支出功能分类的预算总额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT expense_category, SUM(annual_budget) AS total_budget FROM budget_indicator WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY expense_category ORDER BY total_budget DESC

test_cases.question: 各城市财政收入按收入类型汇总
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, revenue_type, SUM(actual_amount) AS total FROM fiscal_revenue WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY region_name, revenue_type ORDER BY region_name

test_cases.question: 各城市的三公经费总支出
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, SUM(actual_amount) AS total_expense FROM three_public_expense WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY total_expense DESC

test_cases.question: 各部门的预算执行总额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT dept_name, SUM(executed_amount) AS total_executed FROM budget_execution WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY dept_name ORDER BY total_executed DESC

test_cases.question: 哪些部门的预算进行了调增？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, dept_name, annual_budget, adjusted_budget, adjusted_budget - annual_budget AS increase FROM budget_indicator WHERE adjusted_budget > annual_budget AND fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 哪些三公经费实际支出超过了预算？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, dept_name, expense_type, budget_amount, actual_amount, actual_amount - budget_amount AS overrun FROM three_public_expense WHERE actual_amount > budget_amount AND fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 各类三公经费的总预算和实际支出
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT expense_type, SUM(budget_amount) AS total_budget, SUM(actual_amount) AS total_actual FROM three_public_expense WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY expense_type

test_cases.question: 各季度的预算执行金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT quarter, SUM(executed_amount) AS total FROM budget_execution WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY quarter ORDER BY quarter

test_cases.question: 税收收入最高的3个城市
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, SUM(actual_amount) AS total_tax FROM fiscal_revenue WHERE revenue_type = '税收收入' AND fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY total_tax DESC LIMIT 3

test_cases.question: 各专项资金的拨付率
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT fund_name, total_amount, allocated_amount, ROUND(allocated_amount / total_amount * 100, 2) AS allocation_rate FROM special_fund WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 ORDER BY allocation_rate

test_cases.question: 查询杭州市第一季度的预算执行记录
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT dept_name, expense_category, executed_amount, payment_date, payee FROM budget_execution WHERE region_name = '杭州市' AND quarter = 1 AND fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 查询财政收入完成率低于90%的收入项目
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, revenue_category, planned_amount, actual_amount, ROUND(actual_amount / planned_amount * 100, 2) AS completion_rate FROM fiscal_revenue WHERE actual_amount / planned_amount < 0.9 AND fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 各城市的专项资金总额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, COUNT(*) AS fund_count, SUM(total_amount) AS total FROM special_fund WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY total DESC

test_cases.question: 查询已审计的专项资金
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT fund_name, region_name, total_amount, used_amount, fund_status FROM special_fund WHERE audit_flag = 1

test_cases.question: 各收入科目的计划收入和实际收入
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT revenue_category, SUM(planned_amount) AS total_planned, SUM(actual_amount) AS total_actual FROM fiscal_revenue WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY revenue_category ORDER BY total_actual DESC

test_cases.question: 杭州市各部门的三公经费总支出
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT dept_name, SUM(actual_amount) AS total FROM three_public_expense WHERE region_name = '杭州市' AND fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY dept_name ORDER BY total DESC

test_cases.question: 专项资金额度最大的前5项
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT fund_name, region_name, total_amount, fund_type FROM special_fund ORDER BY total_amount DESC LIMIT 5

test_cases.question: 查询直接支付方式的预算执行记录
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT dept_name, region_name, executed_amount, payment_date, payee FROM budget_execution WHERE payment_type = '直接支付' AND fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 各支付方式的执行金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT payment_type, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(executed_amount) AS total FROM budget_execution WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY payment_type

test_cases.question: 各部门的预算执行进度（执行率）
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT bi.dept_name, bi.region_name, bi.adjusted_budget, IFNULL(SUM(be.executed_amount), 0) AS total_executed, ROUND(IFNULL(SUM(be.executed_amount), 0) / bi.adjusted_budget * 100, 2) AS execution_rate FROM budget_indicator bi LEFT JOIN budget_execution be ON bi.dept_code = be.dept_code AND bi.region_code = be.region_code AND bi.fiscal_year = be.fiscal_year AND bi.expense_category = be.expense_category WHERE bi.fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY bi.dept_name, bi.region_name, bi.adjusted_budget ORDER BY execution_rate

test_cases.question: 查找预算调增幅度超过5%的部门
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, dept_name, annual_budget, adjusted_budget, ROUND((adjusted_budget - annual_budget) / annual_budget * 100, 2) AS adjust_rate FROM budget_indicator WHERE adjusted_budget > annual_budget AND (adjusted_budget - annual_budget) / annual_budget > 0.05 AND fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 各城市的财政收入完成率
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, SUM(planned_amount) AS total_planned, SUM(actual_amount) AS total_actual, ROUND(SUM(actual_amount) / SUM(planned_amount) * 100, 2) AS completion_rate FROM fiscal_revenue WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY completion_rate DESC

test_cases.question: 各专项资金的使用进度
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT fund_name, region_name, total_amount, allocated_amount, used_amount, ROUND(used_amount / total_amount * 100, 2) AS usage_rate FROM special_fund WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 ORDER BY usage_rate

test_cases.question: 哪些三公经费比上年同期增长了？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, dept_name, expense_type, last_year_amount, actual_amount, ROUND((actual_amount - last_year_amount) / last_year_amount * 100, 2) AS growth_rate FROM three_public_expense WHERE actual_amount > last_year_amount AND last_year_amount > 0 AND fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 各城市税收收入和非税收入的比例
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, SUM(CASE WHEN revenue_type = '税收收入' THEN actual_amount ELSE 0 END) AS tax_revenue, SUM(CASE WHEN revenue_type = '非税收入' THEN actual_amount ELSE 0 END) AS non_tax_revenue, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN revenue_type = '税收收入' THEN actual_amount ELSE 0 END) / SUM(actual_amount) * 100, 2) AS tax_pct FROM fiscal_revenue WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY region_name

test_cases.question: 查询资金使用率低于60%的专项资金
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT fund_name, region_name, total_amount, used_amount, ROUND(used_amount / total_amount * 100, 2) AS usage_rate FROM special_fund WHERE used_amount / total_amount < 0.6 AND fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 杭州市各部门各季度的预算执行金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT dept_name, quarter, SUM(executed_amount) AS quarterly_amount FROM budget_execution WHERE region_name = '杭州市' AND fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY dept_name, quarter ORDER BY dept_name, quarter

test_cases.question: 三公经费中公务用车支出最高的5个部门
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, dept_name, actual_amount FROM three_public_expense WHERE expense_type = '公务用车' AND fiscal_year = 2024 ORDER BY actual_amount DESC LIMIT 5

test_cases.question: 各城市的预算调整幅度
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, SUM(annual_budget) AS total_original, SUM(adjusted_budget) AS total_adjusted, ROUND((SUM(adjusted_budget) - SUM(annual_budget)) / SUM(annual_budget) * 100, 2) AS adjust_rate FROM budget_indicator WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY adjust_rate DESC

test_cases.question: 各城市各类型三公经费对比
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, expense_type, SUM(budget_amount) AS total_budget, SUM(actual_amount) AS total_actual FROM three_public_expense WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY region_name, expense_type ORDER BY region_name

test_cases.question: 查找拨付金额与已使用金额差异大于20%的专项资金
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT fund_name, region_name, allocated_amount, used_amount, ROUND((allocated_amount - used_amount) / allocated_amount * 100, 2) AS idle_rate FROM special_fund WHERE (allocated_amount - used_amount) / allocated_amount > 0.2 AND fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 各城市教育支出占总预算的比例
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT bi.region_name, SUM(CASE WHEN bi.expense_category = '教育' THEN bi.annual_budget ELSE 0 END) AS education_budget, SUM(bi.annual_budget) AS total_budget, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN bi.expense_category = '教育' THEN bi.annual_budget ELSE 0 END) / SUM(bi.annual_budget) * 100, 2) AS education_pct FROM budget_indicator bi WHERE bi.fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY bi.region_name ORDER BY education_pct DESC

test_cases.question: 查询实际收入超过计划收入的收入科目
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, revenue_category, planned_amount, actual_amount, ROUND(actual_amount - planned_amount, 2) AS excess FROM fiscal_revenue WHERE actual_amount > planned_amount AND fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 各部门三公经费预算执行率
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT dept_name, SUM(budget_amount) AS total_budget, SUM(actual_amount) AS total_actual, ROUND(SUM(actual_amount) / SUM(budget_amount) * 100, 2) AS execution_rate FROM three_public_expense WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY dept_name ORDER BY execution_rate DESC

test_cases.question: 中央转移支付专项资金的执行情况
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT fund_name, region_name, total_amount, allocated_amount, used_amount, ROUND(used_amount / total_amount * 100, 2) AS usage_rate FROM special_fund WHERE fund_type = '中央转移支付' AND fiscal_year = 2024 ORDER BY usage_rate

test_cases.question: 公务接待人次最多的部门
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, dept_name, person_count, actual_amount FROM three_public_expense WHERE expense_type = '公务接待' AND fiscal_year = 2024 ORDER BY person_count DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: 各城市增值税收入占税收总收入的比例
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT fr1.region_name, fr1.actual_amount AS vat_revenue, (SELECT SUM(actual_amount) FROM fiscal_revenue fr2 WHERE fr2.region_name = fr1.region_name AND fr2.revenue_type = '税收收入' AND fr2.fiscal_year = 2024) AS total_tax, ROUND(fr1.actual_amount / (SELECT SUM(actual_amount) FROM fiscal_revenue fr2 WHERE fr2.region_name = fr1.region_name AND fr2.revenue_type = '税收收入' AND fr2.fiscal_year = 2024) * 100, 2) AS vat_pct FROM fiscal_revenue fr1 WHERE fr1.revenue_category = '增值税' AND fr1.fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 查找预算执行中收款方为各中小学的记录
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, dept_name, executed_amount, payment_date, payee FROM budget_execution WHERE payee LIKE '%中小学%' AND fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 各专项资金类型的总金额和平均使用率
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT fund_type, COUNT(*) AS fund_count, SUM(total_amount) AS total, ROUND(AVG(used_amount / total_amount) * 100, 2) AS avg_usage_rate FROM special_fund WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY fund_type

test_cases.question: 2024年专项资金总额是多少？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(total_amount) AS total FROM special_fund WHERE fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 列出所有中央转移支付的专项资金
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT fund_name, region_name, total_amount FROM special_fund WHERE fund_type = '中央转移支付'

test_cases.question: 查询科技类的预算执行记录
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, dept_name, executed_amount, payment_date, payee FROM budget_execution WHERE expense_category = '科技' AND fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 哪个城市的土地出让金收入最高？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, actual_amount FROM fiscal_revenue WHERE revenue_category = '土地出让金' AND fiscal_year = 2024 ORDER BY actual_amount DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: 三公经费中因公出国的总支出
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(actual_amount) AS total FROM three_public_expense WHERE expense_type = '因公出国' AND fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 各城市预算指标的数量
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, COUNT(*) AS indicator_count FROM budget_indicator WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY indicator_count DESC

test_cases.question: 查找三公经费同比增长超过10%的记录
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, dept_name, expense_type, last_year_amount, actual_amount, ROUND((actual_amount - last_year_amount) / last_year_amount * 100, 2) AS growth_rate FROM three_public_expense WHERE last_year_amount > 0 AND (actual_amount - last_year_amount) / last_year_amount > 0.1 AND fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 查询宁波市的财政收入明细
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT revenue_type, revenue_category, planned_amount, actual_amount FROM fiscal_revenue WHERE region_name = '宁波市' AND fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 各部门预算执行的季度分布
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT dept_name, SUM(CASE WHEN quarter = 1 THEN executed_amount ELSE 0 END) AS Q1, SUM(CASE WHEN quarter = 2 THEN executed_amount ELSE 0 END) AS Q2, SUM(CASE WHEN quarter = 3 THEN executed_amount ELSE 0 END) AS Q3, SUM(CASE WHEN quarter = 4 THEN executed_amount ELSE 0 END) AS Q4 FROM budget_execution WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY dept_name

test_cases.question: 哪些专项资金已超过使用截止日期但未结题？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT fund_name, region_name, total_amount, used_amount, deadline, fund_status FROM special_fund WHERE deadline < CURDATE() AND fund_status = '执行中'

test_cases.question: 各城市的财政收支平衡分析
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT fi.region_name, fi.total_revenue, bi.total_budget, fi.total_revenue - bi.total_budget AS balance FROM (SELECT region_name, SUM(actual_amount) AS total_revenue FROM fiscal_revenue WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY region_name) fi JOIN (SELECT region_name, SUM(annual_budget) AS total_budget FROM budget_indicator WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY region_name) bi ON fi.region_name = bi.region_name ORDER BY balance DESC

test_cases.question: 综合审计：查找支出执行率低于50%且三公经费超标的部门
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT bi.dept_name, bi.region_name, bi.adjusted_budget, IFNULL(be_sum.total_exec, 0) AS total_executed, ROUND(IFNULL(be_sum.total_exec, 0) / bi.adjusted_budget * 100, 2) AS exec_rate FROM budget_indicator bi LEFT JOIN (SELECT dept_code, region_code, SUM(executed_amount) AS total_exec FROM budget_execution WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY dept_code, region_code) be_sum ON bi.dept_code = be_sum.dept_code AND bi.region_code = be_sum.region_code WHERE bi.fiscal_year = 2024 AND IFNULL(be_sum.total_exec, 0) / bi.adjusted_budget < 0.5

test_cases.question: 各城市的人均公务接待费用
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, SUM(actual_amount) AS total_reception, SUM(person_count) AS total_persons, ROUND(SUM(actual_amount) / SUM(person_count) * 10000, 2) AS per_person_yuan FROM three_public_expense WHERE expense_type = '公务接待' AND fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY per_person_yuan DESC

test_cases.question: 各城市的财政自给率
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT fi.region_name, SUM(CASE WHEN fi.revenue_type IN ('税收收入', '非税收入') THEN fi.actual_amount ELSE 0 END) AS own_revenue, SUM(fi.actual_amount) AS total_revenue, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN fi.revenue_type IN ('税收收入', '非税收入') THEN fi.actual_amount ELSE 0 END) / SUM(fi.actual_amount) * 100, 2) AS self_sufficiency_rate FROM fiscal_revenue fi WHERE fi.fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY fi.region_name ORDER BY self_sufficiency_rate DESC

test_cases.question: 宁波市各部门的三公经费
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT dept_name, expense_type, budget_amount, actual_amount FROM three_public_expense WHERE region_name = '宁波市' AND fiscal_year = 2024 ORDER BY dept_name, expense_type

test_cases.question: 三公经费预算执行率最高的部门
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT dept_name, region_name, SUM(budget_amount) AS total_budget, SUM(actual_amount) AS total_actual, ROUND(SUM(actual_amount) / SUM(budget_amount) * 100, 2) AS exec_rate FROM three_public_expense WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY dept_name, region_name ORDER BY exec_rate DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: 查询已结题的专项资金
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT fund_name, region_name, total_amount, used_amount FROM special_fund WHERE fund_status = '已结题'

test_cases.question: 各支出分类的预算和执行金额对比
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT bi.expense_category, SUM(bi.adjusted_budget) AS total_budget, IFNULL(SUM(be.total_exec), 0) AS total_executed FROM budget_indicator bi LEFT JOIN (SELECT expense_category, SUM(executed_amount) AS total_exec FROM budget_execution WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY expense_category) be ON bi.expense_category = be.expense_category WHERE bi.fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY bi.expense_category ORDER BY total_budget DESC

test_cases.question: 查询公安局的预算指标
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, expense_category, annual_budget, adjusted_budget FROM budget_indicator WHERE dept_name = '公安局' AND fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 查找专项资金受益人数低于1000但金额超过2万的项目
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT fund_name, region_name, total_amount, beneficiary_count, ROUND(total_amount / beneficiary_count * 10000, 2) AS per_person_yuan FROM special_fund WHERE beneficiary_count < 1000 AND total_amount > 20000 AND fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 各城市三公经费同比变动汇总
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, SUM(last_year_amount) AS last_year_total, SUM(actual_amount) AS current_total, ROUND((SUM(actual_amount) - SUM(last_year_amount)) / SUM(last_year_amount) * 100, 2) AS change_rate FROM three_public_expense WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 AND last_year_amount > 0 GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY change_rate

test_cases.question: 教育局在各城市的预算总额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, SUM(annual_budget) AS total FROM budget_indicator WHERE dept_name = '教育局' AND fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY total DESC

test_cases.question: 专项资金的平均拨付周期
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT fund_name, region_name, start_date, deadline, DATEDIFF(deadline, start_date) AS duration_days FROM special_fund WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 ORDER BY duration_days DESC

test_cases.question: 预算最低的部门
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT dept_name, region_name, annual_budget FROM budget_indicator WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 ORDER BY annual_budget ASC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: 杭州市的税收收入明细
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT revenue_category, planned_amount, actual_amount FROM fiscal_revenue WHERE region_name = '杭州市' AND revenue_type = '税收收入' AND fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 因公出国经费超预算的部门
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, dept_name, budget_amount, actual_amount, actual_amount - budget_amount AS overrun FROM three_public_expense WHERE expense_type = '因公出国' AND actual_amount > budget_amount AND fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 查询涉及项目数最多的专项资金
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT fund_name, region_name, project_count, total_amount FROM special_fund WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 ORDER BY project_count DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: 各城市预算执行的均衡性分析（各季度占比）
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, SUM(CASE WHEN quarter = 1 THEN executed_amount ELSE 0 END) AS Q1, SUM(CASE WHEN quarter = 2 THEN executed_amount ELSE 0 END) AS Q2, SUM(CASE WHEN quarter = 3 THEN executed_amount ELSE 0 END) AS Q3, SUM(CASE WHEN quarter = 4 THEN executed_amount ELSE 0 END) AS Q4, SUM(executed_amount) AS total FROM budget_execution WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY region_name

test_cases.question: 公务用车经费总预算
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(budget_amount) AS total FROM three_public_expense WHERE expense_type = '公务用车' AND fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 综合分析：哪些城市的三公经费超标且财政收入完成率低于95%？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT tpe.region_name, tpe.total_overrun, fr.completion_rate FROM (SELECT region_name, SUM(actual_amount - budget_amount) AS total_overrun FROM three_public_expense WHERE actual_amount > budget_amount AND fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY region_name) tpe JOIN (SELECT region_name, ROUND(SUM(actual_amount) / SUM(planned_amount) * 100, 2) AS completion_rate FROM fiscal_revenue WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY region_name HAVING completion_rate < 95) fr ON tpe.region_name = fr.region_name

test_cases.question: 列出政府性基金预算
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, dept_name, expense_category, annual_budget FROM budget_indicator WHERE budget_type = '政府性基金预算' AND fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 各部门的预算调整金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT dept_name, region_name, annual_budget, adjusted_budget, adjusted_budget - annual_budget AS adjustment FROM budget_indicator WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 AND adjusted_budget != annual_budget ORDER BY adjustment DESC

test_cases.question: 各城市财政收入的结构分析
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, revenue_category, SUM(actual_amount) AS amount, ROUND(SUM(actual_amount) / (SELECT SUM(actual_amount) FROM fiscal_revenue fr2 WHERE fr2.region_name = fr.region_name AND fr2.fiscal_year = 2024) * 100, 2) AS pct FROM fiscal_revenue fr WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY region_name, revenue_category ORDER BY region_name, amount DESC

test_cases.question: 查询教育局的预算执行明细
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, executed_amount, payment_date, payee, quarter FROM budget_execution WHERE dept_name = '教育局' AND fiscal_year = 2024 ORDER BY payment_date

test_cases.question: 查找省级专项资金中使用率低于平均水平的项目
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT fund_name, region_name, total_amount, used_amount, ROUND(used_amount / total_amount * 100, 2) AS usage_rate FROM special_fund WHERE fund_type = '省级专项' AND fiscal_year = 2024 AND used_amount / total_amount < (SELECT AVG(used_amount / total_amount) FROM special_fund WHERE fund_type = '省级专项' AND fiscal_year = 2024)

test_cases.question: 2024年财政收入中罚没收入有多少？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(actual_amount) AS total FROM fiscal_revenue WHERE revenue_category = '罚没收入' AND fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 专项资金使用率最高的3项
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT fund_name, region_name, total_amount, used_amount, ROUND(used_amount / total_amount * 100, 2) AS usage_rate FROM special_fund WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 ORDER BY usage_rate DESC LIMIT 3

test_cases.question: 各城市非税收入的构成
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, revenue_category, actual_amount FROM fiscal_revenue WHERE revenue_type = '非税收入' AND fiscal_year = 2024 ORDER BY region_name, actual_amount DESC

test_cases.question: 全省预算执行审计综合概览
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT (SELECT SUM(annual_budget) FROM budget_indicator WHERE fiscal_year = 2024) AS total_budget, (SELECT SUM(executed_amount) FROM budget_execution WHERE fiscal_year = 2024) AS total_executed, (SELECT SUM(actual_amount) FROM fiscal_revenue WHERE fiscal_year = 2024) AS total_revenue, (SELECT SUM(actual_amount) FROM three_public_expense WHERE fiscal_year = 2024) AS total_three_public, (SELECT SUM(total_amount) FROM special_fund WHERE fiscal_year = 2024) AS total_special_fund

test_cases.question: 查询第二季度的所有预算执行记录
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, dept_name, expense_category, executed_amount, payment_date, payee FROM budget_execution WHERE quarter = 2 AND fiscal_year = 2024 ORDER BY payment_date

test_cases.question: 查找公务接待费人均超过300元的部门
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, dept_name, actual_amount, person_count, ROUND(actual_amount / person_count * 10000, 2) AS per_person_yuan FROM three_public_expense WHERE expense_type = '公务接待' AND person_count > 0 AND actual_amount / person_count * 10000 > 300 AND fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 各城市财政收入总额排名
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, SUM(actual_amount) AS total_revenue FROM fiscal_revenue WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

test_cases.question: 各专项资金受益人均金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT fund_name, region_name, total_amount, beneficiary_count, ROUND(total_amount / beneficiary_count * 10000, 2) AS per_person_yuan FROM special_fund WHERE beneficiary_count > 0 AND fiscal_year = 2024 ORDER BY per_person_yuan DESC

test_cases.question: 查询水利局的预算执行记录
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, expense_category, executed_amount, payment_date, payee FROM budget_execution WHERE dept_name = '水利局' AND fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 哪些城市的教育预算执行率低于全省平均水平？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT bi.region_name, bi.adjusted_budget AS edu_budget, IFNULL(be_sum.total_exec, 0) AS edu_executed, ROUND(IFNULL(be_sum.total_exec, 0) / bi.adjusted_budget * 100, 2) AS exec_rate FROM budget_indicator bi LEFT JOIN (SELECT region_code, SUM(executed_amount) AS total_exec FROM budget_execution WHERE expense_category = '教育' AND fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY region_code) be_sum ON bi.region_code = be_sum.region_code WHERE bi.expense_category = '教育' AND bi.fiscal_year = 2024 AND bi.dept_name = '教育局' HAVING exec_rate < (SELECT AVG(sub_rate) FROM (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(be2.executed_amount), 0) / bi2.adjusted_budget AS sub_rate FROM budget_indicator bi2 LEFT JOIN budget_execution be2 ON bi2.region_code = be2.region_code AND bi2.expense_category = be2.expense_category WHERE bi2.expense_category = '教育' AND bi2.dept_name = '教育局' AND bi2.fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY bi2.region_code) AS tmp)

test_cases.question: 各城市的专项资金数量和总额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, COUNT(*) AS fund_count, SUM(total_amount) AS total_amount FROM special_fund WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY total_amount DESC

test_cases.question: 查找三公经费节约金额最大的部门
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, dept_name, SUM(budget_amount) AS total_budget, SUM(actual_amount) AS total_actual, SUM(budget_amount - actual_amount) AS savings FROM three_public_expense WHERE actual_amount < budget_amount AND fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY region_name, dept_name ORDER BY savings DESC LIMIT 5

test_cases.question: 预算执行的总金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(executed_amount) AS total FROM budget_execution WHERE fiscal_year = 2024

test_cases.question: 全省财政收入Top5城市及其收入构成占比
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT region_name, SUM(actual_amount) AS total_revenue, ROUND(SUM(actual_amount) / (SELECT SUM(actual_amount) FROM fiscal_revenue WHERE fiscal_year = 2024) * 100, 2) AS pct_of_total FROM fiscal_revenue WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY region_name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 5

test_cases.question: 预算执行审计综合指标：各城市的预算总额、执行总额、收入总额、三公总额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT bi.region_name, bi.total_budget, IFNULL(be.total_exec, 0) AS total_executed, IFNULL(fr.total_revenue, 0) AS total_revenue, IFNULL(tpe.total_three, 0) AS total_three_public FROM (SELECT region_name, SUM(annual_budget) AS total_budget FROM budget_indicator WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY region_name) bi LEFT JOIN (SELECT region_name, SUM(executed_amount) AS total_exec FROM budget_execution WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY region_name) be ON bi.region_name = be.region_name LEFT JOIN (SELECT region_name, SUM(actual_amount) AS total_revenue FROM fiscal_revenue WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY region_name) fr ON bi.region_name = fr.region_name LEFT JOIN (SELECT region_name, SUM(actual_amount) AS total_three FROM three_public_expense WHERE fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY region_name) tpe ON bi.region_name = tpe.region_name ORDER BY bi.total_budget DESC
